about: Thanks for stopping by!  This is my minimal personal site for sharing projects, notes, and links. I also have a site dedicated to my visual art at [www.toji.studio](http://www.toji.ca)

projects.name: Musical Scale Visualizer
projects.description: Pick a root note, a scale and see what keys on the piano are appropriate... Plays sounds too!

projects.name: EP-133 Simulator
projects.description: Web-based simulator for a Teenage Engineering EP-133 sequencer device.

highlights: Focused on clean UI and maintainable code.

links.label: Toji Studios - My visual art portfolio
